pages.text: Using Vanity, you can change the model for your tools.
pages.title: Vanity
Botania
pages.text: Botania is our tech mod. The guidebook is already in your Akashic Tome.

pages.title: Apotheosis
pages.text: Apotheosis redoes enchantments and adds new loot to the world. The guidebook is already in your Akashic Tome.
Iron's Spellbooks adds spellcasting! The guidebook is already in your Akashic Tome.
pages.title: Iron's Spellbooks

pages.text: Via Romana is our fast travel mod. Check the modrinth page for more details. The logs in our hearttree are valid paths.
pages.title: Via Romana

pages.text: Farmer's Delight adds more cooking mechanics if you like that sort of thing.
pages.title: Farmer's Delight
Antique Atlas
pages.text: Press 'M' to open your map. Enter the command '/surveyor share [player]' to share your map with another player. The resource packs for mods should all be configured, if they aren't then you will need to enable them in the resource pack menu.

pages.title: Occulus
pages.text: There are shaders installed if you like that sort of thing.
